nasb.text: For I will drive out nations before you and enlarge your borders, and no man shall covet your land when you go up three times a year to appear before the Lord your God.

esv.text: For I will cast out nations before you and enlarge your borders; no one shall covet your land, when you go up to appear before the Lord your God three times in the year.

cnv.text: 我要把列國從你面前趕出去，擴張你的境界；你一年三次上去面見耶和華你的　神的時候，必沒有人貪圖你的地。

ccb.text: 我要从你面前赶走外族人，扩张你的领土。你一年三次来朝见你的上帝耶和华时，必没有人贪恋你的土地。
